positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration featuring a stylized constellation of abstract mountain peaks and celestial bodies. The composition is centered and symmetrical, designed for apparel printing. Use a color palette of deep indigo, muted sage green, and stark cream white, providing high contrast. Incorporate clean lines and sharp silhouettes, evoking a sense of serene adventure and cosmic wonder. Style: Modern Nordic illustration, vector art, clean ink drawing, graphic novel aesthetics. The overall mood is peaceful, stylish, and aspirational. Focus on crisp lines, negative space, and balanced composition.
